memoryArtifacts.headline: Leod Olafson...or Olafsson Brief History
memoryArtifacts.description:
Leod Olafsson
In the year 1237 Leod Olafson or Olafsson became the last king of the Isles, from his name came the family name of MacLeod. He was born about 1200, the son of Olaf the Black,King of Man …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod於大約1200年出生在曼島時，他的父親Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV29歲，母親Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross41歲。他於1220年與Nicarmuin Mac Raild在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1280年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特易納享年81歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod于大约1200年出生在曼岛时，他的父亲Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV29岁，母亲Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross41岁。他于1220年与Nicarmuin Mac Raild在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1280年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特易納享年81岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: Olafson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Olafsen or of its very rare Swedish cognate Olafsson.

variants.name: Olafsen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Olaf, from Old Norse Óláfr, Ólafr, variant Óleifr, earlier Anleifr, from proto-Scandinavian elements meaning ‘ancestor’ + ‘heir, descendant’. Olaf (also Olav, in Sweden Olof) has always been one of the most common Scandinavian names; it continued to be popular in the Middle Ages, in part as a result of the fame of Saint Olaf, King of Norway, who brought Christianity to his country c. 1030. This surname is rare in Denmark. Compare Olafson .

nameMeanings.name: Leod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Derivative of   Leo  , from the oblique case. This form is common as a Jewish name, but recently has also acquired wider currency. The lion is an important symbol among Jews because of Jacob's dying pronouncement that ‘Judah is a lion's whelp’ (Genesis 49:9).

historicEvents.description: The war between Scotland and Norway ends with the Treaty of Perth which transferred Mann to Scotland.
Scottish forces defeat the Manx of the Isle of Man in a decisive battle, firmly establishing Scottish rule of the island.

en.lifeSummary: When Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod was born about 1200, in Isle of Man, his father, Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV, was 29 and his mother, Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross, was 41. He married Nicarmuin Mac Raild in 1220, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1280, in Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United: Iona, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod est né environ 1200, à Île de Man, son père, Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Nicarmuin Mac Raild en 1220, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1280, à Iona, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United: Iona, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod um 1200 in Isle of Man geboren wurde, war sein Vater Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV 29 und seine Mutter Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross 41. Er hat 1220 in Scotland Nicarmuin Mac Raild geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1280 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Iona, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod è nato il circa 1200 nel Isola di Man, il suo padre, Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Nicarmuin Mac Raild nel 1220, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1280, nel Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleodが約1200年にマン島で生まれた時，父Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IVは29歳，母Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Rossは41歳であった。1220年にスコットランドでNicarmuin Mac Raildと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1280年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトアイオナで81歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod(이)가 대략 1200년 맨섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1220년 스컷랜드에서 Nicarmuin Mac Raild(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1280년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이오나에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Ilha de Man, seu pai, Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Nicarmuin Mac Raild em 1220, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1280, em Iona, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United: иона, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod родился около 1200 г. в местности Остров Мэн, его отцу по имени Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicarmuin Mac Raild в 1220 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1280 г. в местности иона, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod nació aproximadamente 1200, en Isla de Man, su papá, Olaf or Odhar Godredsson IV, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Christina MacTaggart of Mann and the Isles, of Ross, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Nicarmuin Mac Raild en 1220, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1280, en Iona, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
